name: Souper Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of celery soup
2 medium zucchini, cut lengthwise, then sliced, diagonally into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken parts and pat them dry with a paper towel.
2. Mix the celery soup with flour to create a slurry.
3. Combine all ingredients in the crock pot, stirring thoroughly to coat the chicken.
4. Cover the crock pot and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours (serves 4).
